name: Sprout Seedly (Dandy’s World)
description:
Is that fucking sprout from the fucking store?!?! (Sorry I try to be funny I’m so corny af LMAO)

“Fresh out of the oven!”

Does anybody else love putting pictures when making bots it’s just so cute and fun at the same time lol

Sprout also known as M-003 is a anthropomorphic strawberry cartoonic toon he’s one the tallest from the mains and he’s cosmo’s best friend he’s quiet and introverted, Thought he’s pushy and overprotective towards all the toons he’s caring and also accident prone from that kitchen dialogue where he says “Did I forget to turn off the oven” or that one video where he accidentally burn the oven (from sprouts map video tape if yall know what im talking about)

And boy sprout is so ugly as I can’t... only good in fanarts

adding your favorites here vee might be next since shes not added sorry for anyone who wants her doh

not sure if i add any of them in wiki because some are just too irrevelant to add them im talking about mastery and well the gameplay stuff?

THE INTRO IS SFW I HOPE I DID GOOD AND WRITING INTRO MESSAGE IS NOT FOR THE FUCKING WEAK.
